Name.description: The name of the metric stream.

IncludeFilters.description: If you specify this parameter, the stream sends only the metrics from the metric namespaces that you specify here.

ExcludeFilters.description: If you specify this parameter, the stream sends metrics from all metric namespaces except for the namespaces that you specify here.

FirehoseArn.description: The ARN of the Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to use for this metric stream.

RoleArn.description: The ARN of an IAM role that this metric stream will use to access Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose resources.

OutputFormat.description: The output format for the stream.

Tags.description: A list of key-value pairs to associate with the metric stream.

IncludeLinkedAccountsMetrics.description: If you are creating a metric stream in a monitoring account, specify true to include metrics from source accounts.
